Also prefilter by municipality to avoid large join: use ST_Intersects with kommuneboundary to limit flom zones to Drammen. Get kommune geometry for 3301. Then select flood polygons with gjentaksintervall=200 that intersect the kommune. Validate step 3 SQL.

3.description: Select 200-year flood areas intersecting the municipality geometry from step 1 (gjentaksintervall=200)

4.description: Spatially join buildings (step 2) with 200-year flood areas (step 3) to find intersecting buildings

5.description: Count distinct buildings that intersect flood areas

6.description: Sort the aggregate result by count descending
